/usr/bin/ar qc "NovaPitch_artefacts/Release/libNova Pitch_SharedCode.a" CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/Source/PluginProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/Source/PluginEditor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/NovaPitch_artefacts/JuceLibraryCode/Release/juce_LinuxSubprocessHelperBinaryData.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_processors/juce_audio_processors.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_processors/juce_audio_processors_ara.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_processors/juce_audio_processors_lv2_libs.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_gui_extra/juce_gui_extra.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_gui_basics/juce_gui_basics.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Harfbuzz.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_graphics/juce_graphics_Sheenbidi.c.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_events/juce_events.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_core/juce_core.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_core/juce_core_CompilationTime.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_data_structures/juce_data_structures.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_basics/juce_audio_basics.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_devices/juce_audio_devices.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_formats/juce_audio_formats.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_utils/juce_audio_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_dsp/juce_dsp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_opengl/juce_opengl.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib "NovaPitch_artefacts/Release/libNova Pitch_SharedCode.a"
